html:
Exclusive to:

Coral is a resource in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be obtained by mining Coral Reefs. It is also frequently obtained when using a Trawl Net. Coral is used to craft Particulate Purifiers, Anti Venom, and Mussel Beds, and can also be Refined into Limestone.

Tips

  • Bottlenose Ballphins can be hired to mine coral. While they only work at daytime, befriending a few of them help efficiently mining coral without wearing out the Pickaxe's durability.

Gallery

  • Coral lying on the ground.

“A chunk of calcium carbonate.”
–Wickerbottom
“Maybe I could crush it down to make something new.”
–Woodie
“It's quite lovely.”
–Maxwell
“Ah! Marine invertebrates I can use in inventions!”
–Wagstaff
“The sea bequeaths such strange gifts.”
–Wigfrid
“Pretty colors.”
–Webber
“I need a fish tank to put this in!”
–Walani
“What shall I make with you?”
–Warly
“This'll tear up a boat right quick!”
–Woodlegs
“A ROCK BY ANY OTHER NAME”
–Wilba
“Water rocks”
–Wormwood
“I need to find more of them.”
–Wheeler
Coral is a resource in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be obtained by mining Coral Reefs. It is also frequently obtained when using a Trawl Net. Coral is used to craft Particulate Purifiers, Anti Venom, and Mussel Beds, and can also be Refined into Limestone.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

San hô là một tài nguyên trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó có thể thu được bằng cách khai thác Rạn san hô. Nó cũng thường thu được khi sử dụng Lưới Rà. San hô được sử dụng để chế tạo Máy lọc hạt, Thuốc chống nọc độc và Giường Vẹm, đồng thời cũng có thể được Tinh chế thành Đá vôi.
